business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management - warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.coverage_type: Commercial Property - Building and Personal Property
coverages_discussed.notes: Form CP 00 10 10 12. Declarations also show Business Income 62590000. Coinsurance 80%; Deductible 75000.
Endorsement CP 15 08 10 12, effective 2026-03-15. Pays actual loss of business income sustained due to necessary suspension of operations during the period of restoration.
Endorsement CP 04 05 10 12, effective 2026-03-15. Provides Coverage A for loss to the undamaged portion of the building when demolition is required by ordinance or law.
Endorsement CP 04 17 10 12, effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage caused by interruption of utility services, including water supply, communication supply, and power supply.
Endorsement CP 99 30 07 88, effective 2026-03-15. Suspends the Coinsurance Additional Condition for scheduled property during the declarations period.
Endorsement CP 04 09 10 12, effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss or damage caused by an equipment breakdown accident to covered mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

positives: Declarations include building 146260000, contents 42495000, and business income 62590000 limits.
Coverage is broadened by Business Income and Extra Expense, Ordinance or Law, Utility Services - Direct Damage, Agreed Value, and Equipment Breakdown endorsements.
Agreed Value endorsement suspends coinsurance for scheduled property.
concerns: Operations include warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio.
Vacancy provisions apply if a building is vacant for more than 60 consecutive days before loss.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management - warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio
